hooks.command:
node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(p)&&!/node_modules/.test(p)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('npx tsc --noEmit',{cwd:process.env.CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR||process.cwd(),stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){const out=e.stdout?.toString()||'';const err=e.stderr?.toString()||'';console.error('[TypeCheck] Type errors found after editing '+p);if(out)console.error(out.split('
').slice(0,20).join('
'));if(err)console.error(err.split('
').slice(0,10).join('
'));}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Run tsc --noEmit after editing TypeScript files to catch type errors early

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const ns=i.tool_input?.new_string||i.tool_input?.content||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(p)&&/console\.log/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] console.log detected in '+p+' — remove before merging to main');}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log statements in edited TypeScript/JavaScript files

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';const lines=cmd.split('\n');const hasFlag=lines.some(l=>/^\s*git\s+(commit|push).*--no-verify/.test(l));if(hasFlag){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: --no-verify skips pre-commit hooks. Fix the underlying issue instead.');process.exit(2);}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block git --no-verify to prevent bypassing pre-commit hooks
Block commits that may contain Q360 or Gemini credentials in staged files

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const sharedPaths=[/lib\/(q360|types|constants)\.ts$/,/app\/api\/q360\//,/components\/ui\//];const isShared=sharedPaths.some(re=>re.test(p));if(isShared){console.error('[Hook] Editing shared layer: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Shared files affect all 3 teams — coordinate with team lead before merging');}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Warn when editing shared layer files that affect all feature teams
